title: Spotlight | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Spotlight
What I’m Working on: Mohamed Yunus Rafiq, Assistant Professor of Anthropology Assistant Professor Mohamed Yunus Rafiq on his research on NGOs and child and maternal health in Tanzania.
How Are Neighborhood Organizations Helping Residents During the Shanghai Lockdown?Assistant Professor of Sociology Miao Jia reexamines the role neighborhood committees during the pandemic
Using the Power of Language to Make A Difference: ENGD-SHU 101B Deans' Service Scholars: Language & Power"You come out of the experience with more questions than answers."
New Campus Preview: A Visit to the Qiantan NeighborhoodA sneak peek at our soon-to-be neighborhood in Shanghai's Qiantan district.
Women Who Inspire Us: International Women’s Day 2022NYU Shanghai community members are inspired by mothers, mentors, philosophers, soccer teams, and more.
The Now and Future CityHow is Shanghai a living lab for NYU Shanghai faculty looking to build better urban futures?
Winter Olympics 2022: NYU Shanghai’s Winter Sports Athletes Share What It’s Like on the Ice and the SlopesNYU Shanghai community members share their experiences competing in winter sports.
What I'm Reading: Chancellor Tong ShijunChancellor Tong shares some favorite titles from his overstuffed office shelves.
Student Health Center Opens De-Stress OasisThe 6th floor recently opened up a space for students to take a break from their studies and relax.
What We’re Thankful For This YearA virtual thank-you note from members of our community this Thanksgiving.
What I’m Working on: Can When You Eat Affect How Well You Sleep?Research Assistant Professor of Psychology Daniel Jin Blum studies how our eating habits - specifically the time of day people start and stop eating - can improve sleep quality and overall health. He took a few minutes to share his latest research projects, and offer a few tips on improving our…
Research Assistant Professor of Psychology Daniel Jin Blum studies how our eating habits - specifically the time of day people start and stop eating - can improve sleep quality and overall health. He took a few minutes to share his latest research projects, and offer a few tips on improving our…
Conversing with Your Computer: CSCI-SHU 376 Natural Language ProcessingFor most people who watched the Disney animated movie Big Hero 6, having a kind and empathetic robot companion like the character Baymax to protect, teach, and support you seems like straight-up science fiction. But for NYU Shanghai Professor of Practice in Computer Science Wilson Tam Yik-Cheung…
For most people who watched the Disney animated movie Big Hero 6, having a kind and empathetic robot companion like the character Baymax to protect, teach, and support you seems like straight-up science fiction. But for NYU Shanghai Professor of Practice in Computer Science Wilson Tam Yik-Cheung…
Meet the Class of 2025 Meet some members of NYU Shanghai’s newest class of first year students!
Winners Announced at NYU Shanghai “One in 24” Film RaceStudent film organization 24 Frames hosted its annual 24-hour film race One in 24 on September 18-19.
NYU Shanghai Hosts First-Ever College and Career Lab for Migrant Youth40 migrant teens spent two weeks at a specialized summer camp at NYU Shanghai this July.
